span.p: Section 114: Abettor present when offence committed (eff: 1872-01-01)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Any person who, if absent, would be liable to be punished as an abettor

span.p: Is present when the act or offence for which he would be punishable in conseq...

span.p: He shall be deemed to have committed such act or offence
